--- Thread (50 messages, 2020-11-25) ---
[2020-11-25 16:02] masn6811 (Masne98888): @Elyot it seems weird that klyston merc destroys granularity and also is more efficient than S
if anything, id be more inclined to try:
7B
Start of turn: Gain X
Click, pay X: Destroy an engineer
[2020-11-25 16:03] elyot: klystron is not shipping anytime soon, possibly never
[2020-11-25 16:03] elyot: would need hours of work to fix
[2020-11-25 16:03] elyot: it's doable but not anytime soon
[2020-11-25 16:03] masn6811 (Masne98888): also, arent these units the ones that were leaked way back around 2018?
[2020-11-25 16:03] elyot: yes I mentioned that
[2020-11-25 16:04] masn6811 (Masne98888): well, there was others. i remember floating drone, for example
[2020-11-25 16:04] masn6811 (Masne98888): colossus was another one of the leaks iirc
[2020-11-25 16:05] masn6811 (Masne98888): and i think thunderhead was as well?
[2020-11-25 16:05] elyot: tell me what you think of this one
[2020-11-25 16:07] elyot: "Magna Kronus" : {
    "rarity" : "rare",
    "toughness" : 10,
    "fragile" : 1,
    "defaultBlocking" : 0,
    "buyCost" : "12BGG",
    "buySac" : [["Drone", 2]],
    "buildTime" : 2,
    "beginOwnTurnScript" : {"receive" : "AAA"},
    "abilityScript" : {"receive" : "AAAAA", "delay" : 3},
    "score" : "18BGG"
},
[2020-11-25 16:08] elyot: it's too cheap right now
[2020-11-25 16:08] masn6811 (Masne98888): 12BGGDD
10 :Fragile: , :Time: 2
start of turn: gain XXX
click: gain XXXXX, exhaust 3
(and score is just bot heurustics?)
[2020-11-25 16:09] elyot: actually we had a BBGG version at one point
[2020-11-25 16:09] elyot: so you can attack 3/3/3/3 like colossus and just have 5 extra threat all the time
[2020-11-25 16:09] elyot: or attack 8/0/0/8/0/0/etc.
[2020-11-25 16:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): also supply 4 is rare?
[2020-11-25 16:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): i think in practice, it'll end up attacking 8/3/3/3/3/3
[2020-11-25 16:09] masn6811 (Masne98888): just like how drake attacks 4/2/2/2/2/2
[2020-11-25 16:10] masn6811 (Masne98888): the cost of spiking the attack is too low to gambit it, but pseudo-gambiting it is possible
[2020-11-25 16:11] masn6811 (Masne98888): so if i consider 0/8/3/3/3/3/3 to be about equilvanet as 4/3/3/3/3/3 (but its a sick first attacker)
[2020-11-25 16:12] masn6811 (Masne98888): and the price similar to an omega splitter plus a gauss charge
[2020-11-25 16:12] elyot: yeah I think it looks OK on paper but in practice it's too good
[2020-11-25 16:12] masn6811 (Masne98888): on a quantitative level, balance doesn't seem too off. the probablem is how good it is as a first attacker
[2020-11-25 16:12] masn6811 (Masne98888): and p2 just has a really good rush
[2020-11-25 16:13] masn6811 (Masne98888): the pivot doesn't exactly let p1 undercut
[2020-11-25 16:14] masn6811 (Masne98888): i think the moral of the story is you just have to be really careful about giving efficient buildtime attackers to non-red
[2020-11-25 16:14] masn6811 (Masne98888): because when a color other than red can ramp attack fast, the color is often unbeatable
[2020-11-25 16:14] masn6811 (Masne98888): speaking of, lancetooth
[2020-11-25 16:14] elyot: the BBGG version is safer against that
[2020-11-25 16:15] elyot: BBGG I think is an underused cost that is less busted than BGG
[2020-11-25 16:15] masn6811 (Masne98888): agreed, especially with the drone cost
[2020-11-25 16:15] elyot: originally there was no drone cost and it was just expensive
[2020-11-25 16:15] masn6811 (Masne98888): like p2 can natural conduit into bb, but then they have CBB and 8 drones
[2020-11-25 16:16] masn6811 (Masne98888): being just expensive or costing 1 drone might be better. right now im just afraid you get in a situation where being half a turn later is just bad
[2020-11-25 16:17] masn6811 (Masne98888): the BB cost would actually do a lot to help this too
[2020-11-25 16:17] masn6811 (Masne98888): i mean, it would hurt if drake was in the set
[2020-11-25 16:17] masn6811 (Masne98888): but otherwise, later player to get it can follow up with double wall
[2020-11-25 16:18] elyot: yeah the problem is if the first player can get 2
[2020-11-25 16:18] elyot: but that might require some really early conduit or massive drone cutting or something
[2020-11-25 16:19] masn6811 (Masne98888): also, if anything, i think it might be interesting to have a design where the click ability gives 7X, so its actually more efficient to click.
but of course you might not want to click anyways because you're threatening less for next turn
[2020-11-25 16:19] elyot: clicking is pretty good early because you can deny absorb
[2020-11-25 16:19] elyot: if you can't then you don't click much and it turns into a gambit game
[2020-11-25 16:20] megasupp (mega-supp): P1 auric auric CB auric almost gets there with pivot
[2020-11-25 16:20] masn6811 (Masne98888): pivot is just a must for the game
[2020-11-25 16:20] elyot: should I add that too for friday?
[2020-11-25 16:21] masn6811 (Masne98888): just about any set with a green unit gets more balanced with pivot
[2020-11-25 16:22] masn6811 (Masne98888): add it for friday for sure, i think there's a good chance people will be asking you to just add it to ladder after playing with it on friday
[2020-11-25 16:22] elyot: you underestimate people's resistance to change 😛
[2020-11-25 16:23] masn6811 (Masne98888): i think one way to curb degenerate magna kronus rushes is to add "When bought: Construct a Gauss Cannon"

[2020-11-25 16:34] elyot: to be better in BP and less good in rushes

[2020-11-25 16:35] megasupp (mega-supp): So in total 6 aurics
[2020-11-25 16:36] masn6811 (Masne98888): oh shoot, you still end up floating 2?
[2020-11-25 16:36] masn6811 (Masne98888): nope, only 1 since you used pivot
[2020-11-25 16:36] megasupp (mega-supp): Ah
Keep forgetting the gold spent on pivot
[2020-11-25 16:36] masn6811 (Masne98888): but the galv chrono rush does get the second on in 2 turns after
[2020-11-25 16:36] masn6811 (Masne98888): proof galv is better than auric
[2020-11-25 16:38] masn6811 (Masne98888): so what wonderboat and i want to do is to make BP less polarized
[2020-11-25 16:39] masn6811 (Masne98888): like BP on its own a bit better (6 hp gauss cannons being the thing mentioned over and over) 6hp isos for sure.
but the OP BP support being a bit worse
[2020-11-25 16:39] masn6811 (Masne98888): but we're waiting to test out this first patch before making any more changes
[2020-11-25 16:40] elyot: btw if anyone has any other ideas for changes for Friday, it's open
[2020-11-25 16:40] elyot: not limiting suggestions to just whatever masn and wonderboat throw at me
[2020-11-25 16:41] megasupp (mega-supp): Its also hilarious that in that galv rush you get to sync the magnas
[2020-11-25 16:42] megasupp (mega-supp): Wait. Disregard previous sentence

--- Thread (50 messages, 2020-11-25) ---
[2020-11-25 16:51] masn6811 (Masne98888): drone sac makes it possible to do crazier rushes though
[2020-11-25 16:52] elyot: it's not good without a follow-up though
[2020-11-25 16:52] elyot: it might be terrifying with gmech/drake
[2020-11-25 16:52] masn6811 (Masne98888): i really liked 16BBB drake, but it has no place in current mata
[2020-11-25 16:53] velizar_ (Name): threatening to buy it as a first attacker might be very strong because then the opponent needs to get a bunch of blue or green to be prepared to defend 8.
[2020-11-25 16:54] velizar_ (Name): then if the opponent buys the soak you don't buy the magna kronus
[2020-11-25 16:55] velizar_ (Name): ... but the opponent might use the BGG to buy a magna kronus of their own, which you can defend against because you have at least BGG
[2020-11-25 16:55] elyot: it has buildtime 2 to prevent that
[2020-11-25 16:55] elyot: you can wait until they buy to set up your D
[2020-11-25 16:56] elyot: maybe it should be even longer
[2020-11-25 16:56] elyot: like buildtime 3 and really high tech/high dronesac/low gold cost
[2020-11-25 16:57] elyot: high G cost makes it harder to buy a lot of them
[2020-11-25 16:57] masn6811 (Masne98888): yes, this is why shock is a bad thing. any number of buildtime means no shock
[2020-11-25 16:57] masn6811 (Masne98888): was the B added to its cost to stop me complaining about mono-G offensive finesse? 🙂
[2020-11-25 16:58] elyot: not your complaint specifically, but the click/not click to attack is a B-like feature
[2020-11-25 16:58] elyot: originally it was just a 3-turn 8 damage "big iso kronus" which was boring
[2020-11-25 16:59] elyot: so we changed it to this
[2020-11-25 16:59] masn6811 (Masne98888): its also R-like, but i think B makes more sense here if you want it to be BP
[2020-11-25 16:59] elyot: I kinda want it to have 2 use cases
[2020-11-25 16:59] elyot: one is BP and a bit degenerate, but won't work without some support
[2020-11-25 17:00] elyot: the other is more traditional, good early unit, good source of threat and finesses, get a couple over time
[2020-11-25 17:00] elyot: maybe there is a third use with a heavy absorb denial strat
[2020-11-25 17:00] elyot: threaten 32 damage at some point
[2020-11-25 17:01] elyot: sync with wincer or scorch
[2020-11-25 17:01] masn6811 (Masne98888): what makes you decide whether a unit is legendary?
[2020-11-25 17:01] masn6811 (Masne98888): eg. fab is 12GGGG, asteri is 16GGGG but rare
[2020-11-25 17:01] elyot: 4 fab is stupid, 1 asteri is pointless
[2020-11-25 17:02] elyot: neither are strictly true but like, it's a philosophy
[2020-11-25 17:02] masn6811 (Masne98888): okay. it seems like stacking this is almost as stupid as stacking vai
[2020-11-25 17:05] masn6811 (Masne98888): i mean if vai is legendary because 2 vai is stupid, 2 of this is also stupid except for the part where it doesnt f*k up your attack indicators

[2020-11-25 18:38] megasupp (mega-supp): I have a slight concern about pivot. That is the timing of conduits.
By that I mean that if there is a high green cost unit like xae fab or thunderhead. You need to decide how are you going to split up conduit buys over turns, and pivot gives p1 options that p2 can't have like buying thunderhead off C/CC or fab off C/C but p2 has to suck it up and buy thunderhead with CC/C and fab with CC/... (C/CC).
[2020-11-25 18:39] megasupp (mega-supp): There is also the issue if you want 3 green in a set and no more (cynestra tia plasma) and p1 can fuge and never buy a conduit. P2 doesn't have that luxury
[2020-11-25 18:40] megasupp (mega-supp): My proposed solution is to give p2 pivot that converts 2g to gg
[2020-11-25 18:44] masn6811 (Masne98888): if needed, we can do this, but it seems unneeded and inelegant.
although p1 has more conduit options, p2 gets the conduit easier to make up for it, and still has more efficient lines in most cases.
the fuge/3-green concern is valid, but feels too edge to worry about rn. please give feedback after friday event to see how it feels in practice
[2020-11-25 18:46] megasupp (mega-supp): How does it seem inelegant? I think it's aesthetically more appealing because symmetry
[2020-11-25 18:50] megasupp (mega-supp): Though that will be terrible for the learning curve. Noobs will always try to use it until someone tells them to stop doing that
[2020-11-25 18:57] megasupp (mega-supp): Also you are right that in most cases p2 has the more efficient line. sometimes because of alt drones p1 has more efficient line. Also I think there can be some strategical shenanigans where you might want to do a weird p2 pivot line (some rps-y sets)

[2020-11-28 09:07] masn6811 (Masne98888): Pivot - fixes so many problems. never made a game more play advantaged, but maybe its because i haven't rolled a feral set. still think p2 is slightly favored, but a lot closer now. pls add to ranked immediately
Thorium Dynamo - feels a lot less an auto-buy, but still very strong, and lines are buttery smooth. feels a lot better to play with. a bit too BP since hp wasnt nerfed. i originally suggested 6, it seems 7 might be fine too. pls add to ranked immediately.
Centrifuge - haven't played around with it enough, but it sure is a lot more fun than 5 cost fuge. maybe theres something busted, but didnt run into it. i like it, wouldnt mind seeing it in ranked, but more testing may be good.
Arka - arka rushes are a lot stronger. get counter-arkad is still a thing, but doesnt feel quite as bad. i really like it, and games certainly feel a lot more exciting than 7hp arka
Smorcus - lines are way smoother and intuitive. hurts the smorcus rush, and the 4 attack smorcus into econ transition (you can still do it, but not as good.) i think this change was an absolute home run. pls add to ranked immediately.
Botch - botch lost a lot of power. its still great in times it gets full soak value, but magna and all the frontline units made this less common. still, i think fastimus botch rush was unhealthy for the game, and even if the new one is a bit weak, id rather see it in ranked.
Centurion - good change. still a powerful unit, but sometimes small red is good enough its not worth buying this. i like making the buy decision non-trivial. 20 seems like a very good number to toss into ranked for now, but open to change to 19/21 in the future.

messages.author: masn6811
messages.content: auto-maid - very annoying. seems fair, and the balance seems pretty good. beware DD/DB/DD1, there's a lot of sets where p2 doesn't have a great response (this is weak against fastimus if smorcus/vore/immo is in the set. otherwise, p2 often has to natural conduit and take the hit, and if p1 has a follow up like oxide, they'd just advantaged)

messages.author: masn6811
messages.content: eviserator - definitely a beatable unit, but very strong. shock and being a red sink makes this fairly good at punishing red, and they might not be able to sink it without an eviserator of their own. won with a t1 forge as p2 in flanimus set. i think more testing may be needed because its really strong, but cant quite say its OP yet

messages.author: masn6811
messages.content: @sano yes that was my first suggestion. it took a few days of convincing for the other people to get me to agree this version is a better idea

messages.author: silentslayers
messages.content: Yes we have discussed that and decided the LS3 nerf was better. It fits perfectly with blood pact, making it elegant, and is also stronger than the 1 HP botch.

messages.author: masn6811
messages.content: vore - pls add to ranked immediately. still very playable, definitely a step in the right direction for this units balance

messages.author: sano712
messages.content: hmm, that is surprising to me, but if the math checks out then it's fine

messages.author: masn6811
messages.content: i think in general in this event, the better balance made gameplay a LOT more interesting

messages.author: masn6811
messages.content: i didnt go on autopilot once for my 50ish games

messages.author: masn6811
messages.content: because it wasnt really possible to go on autoopilot

messages.author: masn6811

messages.author: sano712
messages.content: I agree that pivot, smorcus, and vore seem like they could be added asap

messages.author: sano712
messages.content: I also really like magna

messages.author: masn6811
messages.content: but gambits with robomaid and magna, and pseudo gambits with felid makes the game just a lot more interesting

messages.author: masn6811
messages.content: elyot kinda wants to wait on throium to make sure player lines are balanced

messages.author: masn6811
messages.content:
but there's a extremely smooth thorium line for both players
DD/DD
DD/D1
11/D1

messages.author: masn6811
messages.content: gameplay post-thorium also feels super smooth. the extra granularity is much appreciated

messages.author: masn6811

messages.author: masn6811
messages.content: like pre-patch we had like 85% games standard style and 15% BP, barely any games with semi-BP

messages.author: masn6811

messages.author: masn6811
messages.content: unless you want to experiment with a 1-B version

messages.author: masn6811
